meta.description: Card database for LifeQuest community TCG - v0.2 rules (5 resources, People activate, Locations develop)

cards.name: Cosplay Crafter

abilities.text: Choose another People card you control with the Artist tag. It gains +1 LP this Winter.
While Ready, this card has +1 LP.

cards.flavorText: Three months of hot glue and heartbreak, all for one perfect moment on that stage.
cards.artNotes: Person in elaborate handmade costume, sewing supplies visible, convention hall backdrop.

localConnection.name: Excalibur Con Cosplay Contest
localConnection.description: Annual cosplay competition at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Low cost entry card. Activate ability buffs other Artists. Ongoing rewards keeping her Ready (not activating). Creates tension: activate to buff, or stay Ready for the LP bonus?

cards.name: Vendor Hall Veteran

abilities.text: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Keep one, put the rest on the bottom in any order.
If you control a Location with the Convention tag, draw 1 card instead of looking at 3.

cards.flavorText: She's been selling hand-painted minis since before the con had a name.
cards.artNotes: Older woman behind a vendor table covered in miniatures and art prints, warm smile.

localConnection.name: Convention Vendors
localConnection.description: Represents the dedicated vendors who return year after year

cards.designerNotes: Card selection on a body via Activate. Combo with Convention Locations upgrades to straight draw. High initiative means she resolves before most others. 3 LP is strong for 2 cost — justify with the Activate requirement.

cards.name: DECC Convention Floor
cards.advanceCondition: Control 3 or more cards with the Convention tag

abilities.text: Lvl 1: Cards with the Convention or Pop Culture tag cost 1 fewer total resource (min 0). Lvl 2: Also gain +1 LP per Convention-tagged People you control. Lvl 3: Also, at the start of Summer, you may look at the top card of your deck.
If you control 3 or more People, gain 1 Community token from the shared pool.

cards.flavorText: Where Duluth's biggest fans come together under one roof.
cards.artNotes: Interior of the DECC arena floor filled with vendor booths, cosplayers, and banners. Lake Superior visible through windows.

localConnection.name: Duluth Entertainment Convention Center
localConnection.description: DECC, the venue that hosts Excalibur Con and many community events

cards.designerNotes: Keystone Location for Convention decks. 3 development levels — starts as cost reducer, scales into LP engine + card advantage. Advance condition requires board commitment. Rare is right for this much text.

cards.name: Guest Panel

abilities.text: Draw 2 cards, then discard 1. If you control a People card with the Guest tag, draw 3 instead.

cards.flavorText: The crowd leans forward as the voice actor steps up to the mic.
cards.artNotes: Convention panel room with spotlight on a table of speakers, excited audience silhouettes.

localConnection.name: Excalibur Con Panels
localConnection.description: Guest panels and Q&A sessions at the convention

cards.designerNotes: Basic card draw Event. Learning cost fits thematically. Guest synergy is achievable but not free.

cards.name: Lake Walk Break

abilities.text: Reclaim 1 of your spent Resource Tokens from the shared pool. It can be any type available.

cards.flavorText: Sometimes you need a breath of Lake Superior air between panels.
cards.artNotes: Person walking along the Lakewalk with Lake Superior and the Aerial Lift Bridge in the background, convention badge still hanging around neck.

localConnection.name: Lakewalk
localConnection.description: Duluth's scenic lakeside walking path, minutes from the DECC

cards.designerNotes: Resource recovery staple. In v0.2 economy where tokens don't auto-return, reclaiming from the pool is more valuable. 1 LP + 1 token back is fair for 1 Sustainability. Watch for auto-include.

cards.name: Tabletop Tournament

abilities.text: Both players draw 1 card. You gain 2 LP. The other player gains 1 LP.
If you control a Location with the Convention tag, you gain 3 LP instead of 2.

cards.flavorText: Win or lose, everyone leaves the table with a new friend.
cards.artNotes: Group of diverse people around a tabletop game, dice and cards visible, convention setting.

localConnection.name: Excalibur Con Gaming
localConnection.description: Tabletop gaming tournaments and open play at the convention

cards.designerNotes: Shared benefit card — both draw, but you get more LP. Community cost fits the White archetype identity. Convention Location combo is straightforward.

cards.name: Local Food Truck Rally
cards.advanceCondition: You have 3 or more People in play

abilities.text: Lvl 1: You may claim 1 additional Resource Token this Spring. Lvl 2: Claim 1 additional token and draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Tacos, pierogis, and kettle corn — the real reason half the crowd showed up.
cards.artNotes: Row of colorful food trucks with a line of convention-goers, DECC visible in background.

localConnection.name: Duluth Food Trucks
localConnection.description: Local food vendors who set up near convention events

cards.designerNotes: Resource acceleration Location with 2 development levels. Lvl 2 adds card draw, making it a real engine piece. Growth cost = Black archetype (engine building).

cards.name: Convention Organizer

abilities.text: Search your deck for 1 Event card with the Convention tag and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.
Your next Event card played this Summer costs 1 fewer total Resource Token (minimum 0).

cards.flavorText: She somehow keeps all the plates spinning while making it look effortless.
cards.artNotes: Determined woman with clipboard and headset, walkie-talkie in hand, convention chaos organized behind her.

localConnection.name: Convention Staff
localConnection.description: The volunteers and organizers who make Excalibur Con happen

cards.designerNotes: Tutor on entry + Activate for cost reduction. High initiative (3) means she sets up for others. In the Summer back-and-forth, activate her first, then play the cheap Event. Rare for the tutor.

cards.name: Comic Book Artist Alley
cards.advanceCondition: Control 2 or more People with the Artist tag

abilities.text: Lvl 1: People cards you play with the Artist tag gain +1 LP. Lvl 2: Also, once per Summer, when you play an Artist People, you may draw 1 card.
You may discard 1 card to gain 1 Expression token from the shared pool.

cards.flavorText: Every sketch starts a conversation. Every commission tells a story.
cards.artNotes: Long row of artist tables with original art, prints, and sketches. Artists drawing for fans.

localConnection.name: Artist Alley
localConnection.description: The artist alley section of Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Artist archetype payoff Location. 2 Expression cost is the Red investment. Develops by having Artists on board — natural synergy. Autumn ability provides Expression recycling for the resource-hungry archetype.

cards.name: Opening Ceremony

abilities.text: Each player claims 1 Resource Token of their choice from the shared pool. You draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Welcome to Excalibur Con! Let the games begin.
cards.artNotes: Crowded convention entrance with banners dropping, excited attendees pouring in.

localConnection.name: Excalibur Con Opening
localConnection.description: The official opening ceremony of the convention

cards.designerNotes: Community (White) identity: shared benefit with asymmetric advantage. Both players get a resource, you also get a card. In the new economy where tokens don't return, giving the opponent a free claim is a real cost.

cards.name: Fitger's Brewhouse
cards.advanceCondition: You have 4 or more cards in play total

abilities.text: Lvl 1: Gain 1 LP for each People card you control, up to 2 bonus. Lvl 2: Up to 3 bonus, and you may return 1 of your tokens to the pool to draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: The after-con debrief spot. Best enjoyed with a Lake Superior Ale.
cards.artNotes: Historic brick brewery building interior, warm lighting, group of friends at a table with convention lanyards.

localConnection.name: Fitger's Brewhouse
localConnection.description: Historic Duluth brewery and restaurant, popular after-convention gathering spot

cards.designerNotes: Sustainability (Green) — slow, compounding value. Develops as your board grows. Winter-focused, rewards patience and board building. Lvl 2 adds a token-to-card conversion for late game flexibility.

cards.name: Community Volunteer

abilities.text: Gain 1 token of any type from the shared pool.
Your next Event played this Summer costs 1 fewer Community (min 0).

cards.flavorText: They show up early, stay late, and never ask for credit.
cards.artNotes: Young person in a volunteer t-shirt setting up chairs and hanging banners, cheerful expression.

localConnection.name: Con Volunteers
localConnection.description: The backbone of every community event — unpaid, underappreciated, essential

cards.designerNotes: Community (White) workhorse. Token on entry is tempo. Activate for Event discount creates Summer sequencing decisions: exhaust Volunteer, then play the discounted Event. Low initiative because she's a helper, not a leader.

cards.name: Anime Club President

abilities.text: Reveal the top card of your deck. If it shares a tag with a card you control, draw it. Otherwise, put it on the bottom.

cards.flavorText: Welcome to Anime Club! Cosplay optional but encouraged.

localConnection.name: UMD Anime Club
localConnection.description: University anime club

cards.name: Guest of Honor

abilities.text: Draw 2 cards.
Each other People you control with the Convention tag gains +1 LP this Winter.

cards.flavorText: The crowd goes silent as the legendary creator takes the stage.

localConnection.name: Excalibur Con Guests
localConnection.description: Celebrity convention guests

cards.name: Indie Game Developer

abilities.text: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck.
Return 1 Growth token to the pool. Draw 1 card and gain 1 LP.

cards.flavorText: Three years of weekends, one demo booth. Worth every late night.

localConnection.name: Duluth Indie Devs
localConnection.description: Local indie game developers

cards.name: Sketch Artist

abilities.text: Gain 1 LP. If you control a Location with the Artist tag, gain 2 LP instead.

cards.flavorText: Five bucks for a caricature, fifteen for a portrait.

localConnection.name: Convention Artists
localConnection.description: Sketch artists at Excalibur Con

cards.name: Panel Moderator

abilities.text: Each player draws 1 card. You may look at the top card of your deck.
Events you play with the Convention tag gain +1 LP.

cards.flavorText: One question per person, please -- and hold the spoilers.

localConnection.name: Panel Moderators
localConnection.description: Convention panel hosts

cards.name: Voice Actor Fan

abilities.text: If you control a People card with the Guest tag, draw 1 card.
Choose a People you control. It gains +1 LP this Winter.

cards.flavorText: I've watched that one clip 847 times. Don't judge me.

localConnection.name: Voice Acting Fans
localConnection.description: Dedicated fan community

cards.name: Speed Painter

abilities.text: Discard 1 card. Gain 3 LP this Winter. If the discarded card had the Artist tag, gain 4 LP instead.

cards.flavorText: In thirty minutes, a blank canvas becomes a masterpiece.

localConnection.name: Live Painters
localConnection.description: Live painting performers

cards.name: Trivia Night Champion

abilities.text: Name a card type (People, Location, or Event). Reveal the top card. If it matches, draw it and gain 1 LP. Otherwise, bottom it.

cards.flavorText: What year did the original series premiere? ...1987.

localConnection.name: Convention Trivia
localConnection.description: Trivia events at Excalibur Con

cards.name: Manga Collector

abilities.text: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Put 1 on top and the rest on the bottom.
If you control Comic Book Artist Alley, draw 1 of those cards instead.

cards.flavorText: Volume one through forty-seven. First editions. Don't touch the spines.

localConnection.name: Manga Readers
localConnection.description: Local manga and comic readers

cards.name: Sound Tech

abilities.text: Ready another exhausted People you control. That Person cannot be activated again this year.

cards.flavorText: Check one, check two. All good? Cool, let's roll.

localConnection.name: Tech Volunteers
localConnection.description: Convention tech crew

cards.name: Prop Builder

abilities.text: This card gains +1 LP this Winter.
While you control 2 or more cards with the Artist tag, this card has +1 LP.

cards.flavorText: The foam sword took six weeks. The LED armor took all summer.

localConnection.name: Prop Builders
localConnection.description: Cosplay prop crafters

cards.name: Convention Photographer

abilities.text: Choose a People card any player controls. It gains +1 LP this Winter.
If you activated this card this year, draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Hold that pose. Now one without the mask. Perfect.

localConnection.name: Con Photographers
localConnection.description: Convention photographers

cards.name: Park Ranger

abilities.text: Your Locations with the Nature tag have +1 LP.
Reclaim 1 Sustainability token from the shared pool.

cards.flavorText: Jay Cooke State Park, rain or shine. Fifteen years and counting.

localConnection.name: State Park Rangers
localConnection.description: Minnesota state park staff

cards.name: Trail Guide

abilities.text: Each player draws 1 card. You gain 1 LP for each Location with the Nature tag you control.

cards.flavorText: Watch your step on the basalt -- and keep your eyes peeled for moose.

localConnection.name: Hiking Trail Guides
localConnection.description: North Shore trail guides

cards.name: Local Brewer

abilities.text: Return 1 of your tokens to the pool. Gain 2 LP.

cards.flavorText: It's a porter aged with Lake Superior water. You can taste the iron.

localConnection.name: Bent Paddle Brewing
localConnection.description: Duluth craft brewery

cards.name: Harbor Historian

abilities.text: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Put 1 in your hand and the rest on the bottom.
If you control 2 or more Locations with the Duluth tag, gain 2 LP.

cards.flavorText: That bridge has opened over eleven thousand times. I can tell you about each one.

localConnection.name: Maritime Historians
localConnection.description: Lake Superior maritime historians

cards.name: Ore Boat Captain

abilities.text: Claim 1 Growth token from the shared pool if available.
While you control 3 or more cards total, this card has +1 LP.
Return 1 Growth token to the pool. Each player gains 1 LP.

cards.flavorText: Eight hundred feet of iron and purpose, sliding under the lift bridge at dawn.

localConnection.name: Lake Superior Sailors
localConnection.description: Ore boat crews

cards.name: Farmers Market Vendor

abilities.text: Gain 1 token of any type from the shared pool.
Give 1 of your tokens to your opponent. You and your opponent each gain 1 LP.

cards.flavorText: Try the wild rice. It's from Fond du Lac. You won't find better.

localConnection.name: Duluth Farmers Market
localConnection.description: Local farmers market

cards.name: UMD Student

abilities.text: Draw 1 card, then discard 1 card.
Events you play with the Learning tag have +1 LP.

cards.flavorText: Finals week at the library, con weekend at the DECC. Same energy.

localConnection.name: UMD Students
localConnection.description: University of Minnesota Duluth

cards.name: Lakeside Busker

abilities.text: Gain 1 LP. If you control a Location with the Duluth tag, gain 1 additional LP.
If this card is Ready, gain 1 Expression token from the pool if available.

cards.flavorText: Guitar case open, Lake Superior for a backdrop. Not a bad office.

localConnection.name: Street Musicians
localConnection.description: Canal Park street performers

cards.name: Neighborhood Organizer

abilities.text: Choose a Location you control. It is treated as meeting its advance condition this Autumn.
If you control 2 or more People with the Community tag, draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Door by door, block by block. That's how things actually change.

localConnection.name: Community Organizers
localConnection.description: Duluth neighborhood leaders

cards.name: Winter Sports Enthusiast

abilities.text: Reclaim 1 token of any type from the shared pool.
If you control a Location with the Nature tag, gain 1 LP.

cards.flavorText: Spirit Mountain powder day. Everything else can wait.

localConnection.name: Winter Sports Community
localConnection.description: Spirit Mountain regulars

cards.name: First-Time Attendee

abilities.text: Look at the top card of your deck.
While you control 3 or more other cards with the Convention tag, this card has +1 LP.

cards.flavorText: Is it always this loud? I love it.

localConnection.name: New Con-Goers
localConnection.description: First-time convention attendees

cards.name: Social Media Influencer

abilities.text: Choose a People card you control. It gains +1 LP this Winter.
If you control 3 or more People, draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Sixty thousand followers. They all want to know what badge ribbon I got.

localConnection.name: Content Creators
localConnection.description: Social media at conventions

cards.name: NorShor Theatre
cards.advanceCondition: Control 2 or more People with the Artist tag

abilities.text: Lvl 1: People you play with the Artist or Pop Culture tag gain +1 LP this year. Lvl 2: Also, once per Summer, when you activate an Artist Person, draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Restored and reimagined. The marquee lights up Superior Street once again.

localConnection.name: NorShor Theatre
localConnection.description: Historic Duluth performance venue

cards.name: Gaming Lounge
cards.advanceCondition: Control 2 or more People with the Gamer tag

abilities.text: Lvl 1: Your hand limit is 6 instead of 5. Lvl 2: Also, draw 1 extra card during Spring.

cards.flavorText: Twenty tables, infinite possibilities. Dice hit the table at nine sharp.

localConnection.name: Convention Gaming Room
localConnection.description: Excalibur Con gaming area

cards.name: Cosplay Workshop
cards.advanceCondition: Activate a People with the Artist tag this year

abilities.text: Lvl 1: People with the Artist tag you control have +1 Initiative. Lvl 2: Also, cards with the Artist tag cost 1 fewer Expression (min 0). Lvl 3: Also, gain 1 LP for each Artist-tagged People during Winter.

cards.flavorText: Glue guns at the ready. Show's in three hours.

localConnection.name: Cosplay Crafting Space
localConnection.description: Convention cosplay prep area

cards.name: Canal Park Boardwalk
cards.advanceCondition: You control 4 or more cards total

abilities.text: Lvl 1: Gain 1 LP during Winter. Lvl 2: Gain 1 LP during Winter for each Nature-tagged card you control instead (up to 3).

cards.flavorText: Locals know to bring a jacket. The wind off the lake doesn't care what month it is.

localConnection.name: Canal Park
localConnection.description: Duluth waterfront district

cards.name: Spirit Mountain
cards.advanceCondition: You hold unspent tokens of 3 or more different types

abilities.text: Lvl 1: Gain 1 LP at the start of Spring. Lvl 2: Also, your People with the Nature tag have +1 LP. Lvl 3: Also, at end of Autumn, claim 1 token of any type from the pool.

cards.flavorText: Overlooking the lake from eight hundred feet up. Winter's playground.

localConnection.name: Spirit Mountain
localConnection.description: Spirit Mountain Recreation Area

cards.name: Superior Hiking Trail
cards.advanceCondition: You control a People with the Nature tag

abilities.text: Lvl 1: When you Barter, claim 3 tokens instead of 2 (still return 1). Lvl 2: Also, during Winter, gain 1 LP for each unspent Sustainability token you hold.

cards.flavorText: Three hundred miles of ridgeline, birch, and basalt. One step at a time.

localConnection.name: Superior Hiking Trail
localConnection.description: 310-mile North Shore trail

cards.name: Enger Tower
cards.advanceCondition: You have 3 or more cards in hand

abilities.text: Lvl 1: At the start of Summer, look at the top 2 cards of your deck and put them back in any order. Lvl 2: Look at 3 instead, and draw 1 of them.

cards.flavorText: Five stories of blue stone and a view that goes forever.

localConnection.name: Enger Tower
localConnection.description: Historic Duluth observation tower

cards.name: Chester Creek Cafe
cards.advanceCondition: You control 2 or more People

abilities.text: Lvl 1: Gain 1 LP during Winter. Lvl 2: Also, when a People card you control is played, reclaim 1 Sustainability token from the pool.

cards.flavorText: Where the regulars know your order and the coffee's always fresh.

localConnection.name: Chester Creek Cafe
localConnection.description: Neighborhood cafe in Chester Park

cards.name: Park Point Beach
cards.advanceCondition: You hold 2 or more unspent Sustainability tokens

abilities.text: Lvl 1: At the start of Spring, you may return 1 token to the pool to draw 1 card. Lvl 2: Also, during Winter, gain 1 LP for each Sustainability token you hold (up to 2).

cards.flavorText: The longest freshwater sandbar in the world. Locals claim it; tourists discover it.

localConnection.name: Park Point
localConnection.description: 7-mile Duluth sandbar

cards.name: Duluth Public Library
cards.advanceCondition: You have 4 or more cards in hand

abilities.text: Lvl 1: Draw 1 extra card during Spring (draw 2 total). Lvl 2: Also, your Events cost 1 fewer Learning (min 0).

cards.flavorText: Knowledge doesn't have a cover charge. Never has.

localConnection.name: Duluth Public Library
localConnection.description: Duluth Public Library

cards.name: Grandma's Restaurant
cards.advanceCondition: Control 2 or more People with the Community tag

abilities.text: Lvl 1: Gain 1 LP during Winter for each People with Food or Community tag (up to 2). Lvl 2: Also, once per Summer, when you play a Community-tagged Event, gain 1 LP.

cards.flavorText: Marathon runners, tourists, and locals all end up here eventually.

localConnection.name: Grandma's Restaurant
localConnection.description: Iconic Duluth restaurant

cards.name: Aerial Lift Bridge
cards.advanceCondition: You control cards with 3 or more different tags

abilities.text: Lvl 1: Cards with the Duluth tag you control have +1 LP. Lvl 2: Also, during Spring, claim 1 additional token from the pool. Lvl 3: Also, during Winter, gain 1 LP for each different tag among cards you control (up to 5).

cards.flavorText: Since 1905, the bridge has lifted for every ship that asked.

localConnection.name: Aerial Lift Bridge
localConnection.description: Iconic symbol of Duluth

cards.name: Costume Contest Finals

abilities.text: Gain 2 LP. If you control 2 or more People with the Artist or Pop Culture tag, gain 3 LP instead.

cards.flavorText: The judges deliberate. The audience has already decided.

localConnection.name: Cosplay Contest
localConnection.description: Excalibur Con cosplay competition

cards.name: Late Night Gaming Session

abilities.text: Draw 2 cards, then discard 1. If you control a Location with the Gamer tag, keep all drawn cards instead.

cards.flavorText: It's 2 AM. One more round?

localConnection.name: Late Night Gaming
localConnection.description: Convention after-hours gaming

cards.name: Artist Commission

abilities.text: Gain 1 LP. If you control a People with the Artist tag, gain 2 LP instead.

cards.flavorText: Can you draw my DnD character? She's a tiefling bard with anxiety.

localConnection.name: Convention Commissions
localConnection.description: Artist commissions at cons

cards.name: Surprise Celebrity Cameo

abilities.text: Search your deck for 1 People card and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

cards.flavorText: Wait -- is that actually them? IN DULUTH?!

localConnection.name: Surprise Guests
localConnection.description: Unannounced convention appearances

cards.name: Convention After-Party

abilities.text: Both players gain 1 LP. You draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: The real networking happens after the badge comes off.

localConnection.name: After-Parties
localConnection.description: Post-convention gatherings

cards.name: Trading Card Swap Meet

abilities.text: Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. Put 2 in your hand and the rest on the bottom in any order.

cards.flavorText: Two uncommons and a rare for that holographic. Final offer.

localConnection.name: Card Trading
localConnection.description: Convention card swap events

cards.name: Best in Show

abilities.text: Choose a People you control with the Artist tag. It gains +3 LP this Winter. Draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: And the award goes to...

localConnection.name: Convention Awards
localConnection.description: Excalibur Con awards ceremony

cards.name: Flash Mob Dance

abilities.text: Both players gain 2 LP.

cards.flavorText: It started with one dancer. By the chorus, the whole vendor hall was moving.

localConnection.name: Flash Mobs
localConnection.description: Spontaneous convention performances

cards.name: Viral Moment

abilities.text: Gain LP equal to the number of People you control (up to 4).

cards.flavorText: Three million views overnight. Welcome to the internet.

localConnection.name: Viral Content
localConnection.description: Social media moments

cards.name: Live Art Demo

abilities.text: Draw 1 card. If you control a People with the Artist tag, draw 2 instead.

cards.flavorText: Watch a blank page become a dragon in twenty minutes.

localConnection.name: Live Art
localConnection.description: Live drawing demonstrations

cards.name: Cosplay Photo Shoot

abilities.text: Gain 1 LP. Choose a People you control. It gains +1 LP this Winter.

cards.flavorText: Strike a pose by the lake. The Aerial Lift Bridge makes the best backdrop.

localConnection.name: Cosplay Photography
localConnection.description: Convention photo opportunities

cards.name: Panel Q&A Breakthrough

abilities.text: Draw 3 cards, then discard 1. If you control a People with the Convention tag, discard 0 instead.

cards.flavorText: That question changed the whole conversation.

localConnection.name: Panel Discussions
localConnection.description: Convention panel Q&A sessions

cards.name: Lake Effect Storm

abilities.text: Each player returns 2 of their tokens to the shared pool. You draw 2 cards.

cards.flavorText: The lake decides when the storm ends. Not you.

localConnection.name: Lake Superior Weather
localConnection.description: Lake effect weather patterns

cards.name: Sunrise Over Superior

abilities.text: Gain 2 LP. If you control a Location with the Nature tag, reclaim 1 Sustainability token from the pool.

cards.flavorText: Five thirty AM on the shore. Worth every lost minute of sleep.

localConnection.name: Lake Superior Sunrise
localConnection.description: Sunrise over Lake Superior

cards.name: Community Cleanup Day

abilities.text: Both players gain 2 LP. Return 1 of your tokens to the pool.

cards.flavorText: Forty bags of trash. Twelve volunteers. One very clean park.

localConnection.name: Community Cleanups
localConnection.description: Duluth cleanup events

cards.name: Block Party

abilities.text: Both players draw 1 card. You gain 1 LP for each People you control with the Community tag (up to 2).

cards.flavorText: Grill's fired up, music's playing, and nobody remembers whose yard this started in.

localConnection.name: Block Parties
localConnection.description: Duluth neighborhood block parties

cards.name: Ship Arrives in Harbor

abilities.text: Claim 2 tokens of different types from the shared pool.

cards.flavorText: The horn echoes off the hillside. A thousand feet of steel glides beneath the bridge.

localConnection.name: Ore Boats
localConnection.description: Ships arriving at Duluth harbor

cards.name: Farmers Market Morning

abilities.text: Gain 1 LP. Claim 1 token of any type from the shared pool.

cards.flavorText: Rhubarb season. The early birds got the jam.

localConnection.name: Farmers Market
localConnection.description: Duluth Farmers Market

cards.name: Wildflower Season

abilities.text: Gain 1 LP. Reclaim 1 of your spent tokens from the pool.

cards.flavorText: Trilliums along the trail. Some things can't be rushed.

localConnection.name: Wildflower Season
localConnection.description: Spring wildflowers on North Shore

cards.name: Bonfire on the Beach

abilities.text: Both players gain 1 LP. You gain 1 additional LP. Draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Driftwood crackles. Stars reflect off the water. Nobody checks their phone.

localConnection.name: Beach Bonfires
localConnection.description: Park Point beach gatherings

cards.name: First Snowfall

abilities.text: Each Location you control gains +1 LP this Winter. If you control 3 or more Locations, draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: The city goes quiet. Everything's possible again under fresh white.

localConnection.name: First Snow
localConnection.description: Duluth's first snowfall

cards.name: Historic Walking Tour

abilities.text: Gain 1 LP. If you control a Location with the Duluth tag, gain 2 LP instead.

cards.flavorText: This building survived the 1918 fire. So did the stories inside it.

localConnection.name: Walking Tours
localConnection.description: Historic Duluth walking tours

cards.name: Chance Encounter

abilities.text: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may put a People card from among them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom.

cards.flavorText: You're the one who makes those candles? I've been looking for you everywhere.

localConnection.name: Chance Meetings
localConnection.description: Serendipitous community encounters

cards.name: Moment of Inspiration

abilities.text: Draw 2 cards. Choose a People you control -- it gains +1 LP this Winter.

cards.flavorText: It hit her in the middle of the lecture. The whole thesis, crystal clear.

localConnection.name: Creative Inspiration
localConnection.description: Moments of creative insight

cards.name: Word of Mouth

abilities.text: Search your deck for a card with the Community tag. Add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

cards.flavorText: My neighbor told me about this place. Said it changed her life.

localConnection.name: Word of Mouth
localConnection.description: Community word-of-mouth networks

cards.name: Shared Meal

abilities.text: Both players gain 1 LP. If you control a Location with the Food tag, you gain 2 LP instead.

cards.flavorText: There's always room for one more at the table.

localConnection.name: Community Meals
localConnection.description: Potlucks and shared meals

cards.name: Unexpected Friendship

abilities.text: Draw 1 card. The next People card you play this Summer costs 1 fewer total resource (min 0).

cards.flavorText: Matching cosplays. Different fandoms. Best friends by Sunday.

localConnection.name: New Friendships
localConnection.description: Convention friendships

cards.name: Fresh Start

abilities.text: Return any number of your tokens to the shared pool. For each token returned, draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Sometimes the bravest thing is to let go and begin again.

localConnection.name: New Beginnings
localConnection.description: Fresh starts in the community

cards.name: Excalibur Con Grand Finale

abilities.text: Each player gains LP equal to the number of People they control. You gain 3 additional LP. Both players draw 2 cards.

cards.flavorText: Same time next year?

localConnection.name: Excalibur Con Closing
localConnection.description: Convention closing ceremony

cards.name: SungWon Cho

abilities.text: Each player draws 1 card. You gain 1 LP for each People card you control with the Convention tag.
All People you control gain +1 LP until end of Winter.

cards.flavorText: His voice fills the hall — and somehow, everyone laughs at the same time.
cards.artNotes: Charismatic man at a signing table, long line of excited fans, convention hall backdrop.

localConnection.name: SungWon Cho (ProZD)
localConnection.description: Voice actor and content creator, celebrity guest at Excalibur Con 2026

cards.designerNotes: Legendary headliner. Played trigger gives an immediate board-wide LP buff. Activate is generous (both draw) but you get the LP bonus. High initiative resolves first. 4 LP base is premium for 2 cost — justified by Legendary rarity.

cards.name: Marissa Lenti

abilities.text: Choose a People card you control. It gains +1 LP until end of Winter. If it has the Guest tag, gain 1 Expression token from the pool.
If you control 2 or more Guest-tagged cards, draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: She brought the Amazing Digital Circus to life — and Duluth couldn't get enough.
cards.artNotes: Voice actress at a microphone during a panel, animated expressions, audience captivated.

localConnection.name: Marissa Lenti
localConnection.description: Voice of Pomni in The Amazing Digital Circus, panel guest at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Strong Rare. Activate buffs others and gives resource back if Guest synergy. Summer draw rewards a Guest-heavy board. 3 LP at 1 cost is pushed — Rare rarity justifies it.

cards.name: Andrew Gray

abilities.text: Choose a People card you control. It becomes Ready. (It may activate again this Summer.)
If Christina Masterson is in play, both gain +1 LP.

cards.flavorText: The Red Ranger taught Superhero U — and the crowd paid close attention.
cards.artNotes: Athletic man in a teaching pose, convention stage, fans in superhero costumes.

localConnection.name: Andrew Gray
localConnection.description: Power Rangers Megaforce actor, runs Superhero U workshop at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Readying another People is very strong action advantage. Combo with Christina rewards running both. 2 LP + 2 cost is fair for the powerful activate.

cards.name: Christina Masterson

abilities.text: Draw 1 card. If you control a card with the Guest tag, draw 2 instead and discard 1.
If Andrew Gray is in play, both gain +1 LP.

cards.flavorText: The Pink Ranger had stories that kept the whole panel room on the edge of their seats.
cards.artNotes: Woman at a panel table sharing stories, engaged audience, colorful convention decorations.

localConnection.name: Christina Masterson
localConnection.description: Power Rangers Megaforce actress, panel guest at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Card draw engine. Combo pair with Andrew Gray — run both for mutual +1 LP. Activate draw is bread-and-butter useful. 2 LP base at 2 cost is standard.

cards.name: Elle Firespray

abilities.text: Choose a People card you control. It gains the Artist tag until end of Winter.
People you control with the Artist tag have +1 LP.

cards.flavorText: A steady hand, a fine brush, and suddenly that gray plastic becomes a hero.
cards.artNotes: Person carefully painting a miniature figure at a workshop table, paint pots arrayed around them.

localConnection.name: Elle Firespray
localConnection.description: Mini painting instructor who runs beginner and advanced classes at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Artist tag enabler. Her ongoing makes all Artists better, and her activate lets non-Artists join the party. Low cost, low LP base — value comes from synergy.

cards.name: Dave Wheeler

abilities.text: Gain 1 LP if you control another card with the Artist tag.
If you played an Event this Summer, draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: His pen never stopped moving — sketches for fans between every panel.
cards.artNotes: Comic book artist sketching at a table, stacks of comics and prints, fans watching him draw.

localConnection.name: Dave Wheeler
localConnection.description: Returning comic book artist at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Solid Artist-synergy People. Activate LP with Artist on board, Autumn draw for playing Events. Good in a mixed deck.

cards.name: Dylan Jacobson

abilities.text: Both players draw 1 card. You gain 1 LP.
If you control a Location with the Convention tag, gain 2 LP instead of 1.

cards.flavorText: Drink & Draw wasn't just about the art — it was about making friends over ink and laughter.
cards.artNotes: Artist hosting a social drawing event, people laughing and sketching together at a table with drinks.

localConnection.name: Dylan Jacobson
localConnection.description: Local artist who hosts Dylan's Drink & Draw social art events at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Community-focused artist. Activate is generous — both players draw — but you get LP. Combo with Convention Location doubles the LP payoff. Social gameplay mirrors the character.

cards.name: Erin Glesner

abilities.text: Choose a Location you control. Advance it 1 level (ignore the advance condition this time).
Gain 1 LP for each developed Location you control (level 2+).

cards.flavorText: She built this con from the ground up — and she wasn't done yet.
cards.artNotes: Confident woman with a clipboard and headset coordinating a bustling convention floor.

localConnection.name: Erin Glesner
localConnection.description: Committee Chair of Excalibur Con, the driving force behind the convention

cards.designerNotes: Keystone card for Location development decks. Activate bypasses advance conditions — extremely powerful. Winter LP scales with developed Locations. High initiative (4) means she plans ahead. Rare justified.

cards.name: Dave Sabik

abilities.text: Your opponent discards 1 card of their choice. You gain 1 LP.
If you control another People card with the Convention tag, gain 1 Community token from the pool.

cards.flavorText: The wrestling promoter brought the hype — and the crowd brought the noise.
cards.artNotes: Energetic promoter with a microphone hyping up a crowd in a convention hall wrestling ring area.

localConnection.name: Dave Sabik
localConnection.description: Local wrestling promoter, brings Discover Pro Wrestling entertainment to Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Interaction card — opponent discards. Not too punishing (they choose), but repeated activation is strong. Summer resource gain with Convention synergy. Good tempo card.

cards.name: RPG Game Master

abilities.text: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put 1 in your hand and 1 on the bottom.
Cards with the Gamer tag you play cost 1 fewer total resource (minimum 0).

cards.flavorText: Roll for initiative. Actually, never mind — I'll just tell you what happens.
cards.artNotes: Person behind a GM screen with dice, maps, and miniatures, players gathered around a table.

localConnection.name: RPG Game Masters
localConnection.description: Volunteer GMs who run tabletop RPG sessions at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Card selection on activate plus cost reduction for Gamers. Solid utility card that enables the Gamer archetype. Low LP but high utility value.

cards.name: Cosplay Judge

abilities.text: Choose a People card with the Artist tag. It gains +2 LP until end of Winter.
If you control 2 or more Artist-tagged People, gain 1 LP.

cards.flavorText: Craftsmanship, creativity, presentation — every stitch tells a story.
cards.artNotes: Person with a judging clipboard examining an elaborate cosplay costume, bright stage lights.

localConnection.name: Cosplay Contest Judges
localConnection.description: Judges at the Excalibur Con cosplay contest in Split Rock

cards.designerNotes: Strong Artist buffer. +2 LP to an Artist is a big swing. Autumn bonus rewards having multiple Artists. Pairs well with Elle Firespray who grants Artist tags.

cards.name: Volunteer Coordinator

abilities.text: Ready another People card you control with cost 1 or less.
Gain 1 Community token from the shared pool.

cards.flavorText: Sixty volunteers, two days, one clipboard. She made it look easy.
cards.artNotes: Organized person in a volunteer T-shirt directing helpers with a confident smile.

localConnection.name: Volunteer Pod Leaders
localConnection.description: Volunteer coordinators like Haley and Jackie who manage con volunteer teams

cards.designerNotes: Readying cheap People gives extra actions. Played trigger grabs a Community token for tempo. High initiative (3) on a 1-cost is good for setting up combos.

cards.name: VIP Badge Holder

abilities.text: Draw 2 cards.
You may Forage twice instead of once this Spring (take 2 from pool instead of 1).

cards.flavorText: Early entry, exclusive merch, and a lanyard that opens doors.
cards.artNotes: Person proudly wearing a VIP badge entering the convention before the crowd, exclusive swag in hand.

localConnection.name: VIP Early Entry
localConnection.description: VIP badge holders enter at 10:30 AM, 30 minutes before general admission

cards.designerNotes: Strong draw on entry (2 cards). Spring resource doubling accelerates your economy. Low initiative means you don't get combat priority, but the value is in resources and cards.

cards.name: 501st Legionnaire

abilities.text: Other People you control with the Pop Culture tag have +1 LP.
Gain 1 LP for each Pop Culture-tagged card you played this year.

cards.flavorText: The armor is screen-accurate. The dedication is off the charts.
cards.artNotes: Person in detailed stormtrooper armor posing heroically, kids taking photos, convention backdrop.

localConnection.name: 501st Legion
localConnection.description: Star Wars costuming organization with a double booth and changing room at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Pop Culture lord. Ongoing buff to Pop Culture People, activate scales with Pop Culture cards played this year. Rewards committing to the Pop Culture theme.

cards.name: Nerd Nite Presenter

abilities.text: Both players draw 1 card. You gain 1 LP.
If played during Summer, gain 1 Learning token from the pool.

cards.flavorText: It's like TED talks, but with more lightsabers and less pretension.
cards.artNotes: Enthusiastic speaker at a podium with a quirky presentation slide, engaged laughing audience.

localConnection.name: Nerd Nite
localConnection.description: Community speaker series featured at Excalibur Con with short fun presentations

cards.designerNotes: Knowledge sharing — both draw, you get LP. Combo bonus for Summer timing. Good common role-player.

cards.name: Warhammer General

abilities.text: Gain 1 LP. If you control a Location with the Gamer tag, gain 2 LP instead.
This card has +1 LP if you control 3 or more Gamer-tagged cards.

cards.flavorText: Two thousand points of painted perfection, marshaled across a table-sized battlefield.
cards.artNotes: Focused player moving miniature figures on an elaborate terrain board, dice scattered nearby.

localConnection.name: North Star Open
localConnection.description: Warhammer miniatures tournament hosted at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Gamer archetype payoff. Activate LP doubles with Gamer Location. Ongoing scales with Gamer board presence. Solid 2-cost body.

cards.name: Duluth D&D Player

abilities.text: Roll a die (mentally). Gain 1 or 2 LP (your choice — honor system!).
If you control RPG Hall, gain 2 LP instead and draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Natural 20! ...okay fine, it was a 12, but the roleplay was worth it.
cards.artNotes: Excited player at a table rolling dice with dramatic flair, character sheets and snacks visible.

localConnection.name: DD&D (Duluth Dungeons & Dragons)
localConnection.description: Local D&D games run at Excalibur Con RPG Hall

cards.designerNotes: Fun flavor card. Activate gives 1-2 LP (player decides, honor system mirrors actual RPG play). Combo with RPG Hall is the real payoff. Cheap and cheerful.

cards.name: Celebrity Handler

abilities.text: Guest-tagged People you control cost 1 fewer total resource to play (minimum 0).
Search the top 5 cards of your deck for a People card with the Guest tag. Add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom.

cards.flavorText: Water, schedule, smile. Water, schedule, smile. Repeat for twelve hours.
cards.artNotes: Focused person in a staff shirt walking briskly through a corridor with a clipboard and water bottles.

localConnection.name: Celebrity Handlers
localConnection.description: Staff who manage celebrity guest logistics at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Guest enabler. Ongoing discount makes Guests cheaper to deploy. Activate tutors for Guests. Low LP but high utility — you play this to find your headliners.

cards.name: Keith Hopkins

abilities.text: Gain 2 LP if you played an Event this Summer.
Look at the top card of your deck. You may put it on the bottom.

cards.flavorText: A local story told on a global screen — the premiere was packed.
cards.artNotes: Filmmaker with a camera and clapperboard, excited audience behind him at a screening.

localConnection.name: Keith Hopkins
localConnection.description: Local filmmaker premiering 'Man with a Mania' at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Event-rewards People. Activate pays off big if you played an Event this Summer. Played trigger gives minor card selection. Event-heavy decks love this.

cards.name: Con Security

abilities.text: Your Locations cannot be affected by opponent's card abilities.
If you control 2 or more Locations, gain 1 Growth token from the pool.

cards.flavorText: Badge check. Bag check. Smile check. All clear.
cards.artNotes: Friendly but firm security guard at a convention entrance, checking badges.

localConnection.name: Convention Security
localConnection.description: Security team keeping Excalibur Con safe for all attendees

cards.designerNotes: Defensive card. Location protection is unique and valuable for Location-heavy decks. Spring resource gain with Location board. Low stats but high defensive utility.

cards.name: Pioneer Hall
cards.advanceCondition: Control 3 or more cards with the Vendor or Convention tag

abilities.text: Lvl 1: +1 LP per Vendor-tagged People you control. Lvl 2: Also, when you play a card, gain 1 Growth token from the pool (once per turn). Lvl 3: Also, all your cards cost 1 fewer total resource (minimum 0).
If at max level, gain 2 LP.

cards.flavorText: One hundred and sixty booths. Every single one a world unto itself.
cards.artNotes: Massive convention vendor hall with rows of colorful booths, banners, and streams of attendees.

localConnection.name: Pioneer Hall (DECC)
localConnection.description: Main vendor and exhibitor hall at the DECC, fitting 160 booth spaces

cards.designerNotes: Premium vendor Location. 3 levels of scaling — LP, resources, cost reduction. Advance condition wants Vendor/Convention board. Autumn LP at max level is the payoff for investment.

cards.name: Edmund Fitzgerald Hall
cards.advanceCondition: Control 2 or more People with the Artist or Community tag

abilities.text: Lvl 1: People with the Artist tag you control gain +1 LP. Lvl 2: Also, when you play a People card, draw 1 card.
Gain 1 LP for each Artist-tagged card you control.

cards.flavorText: Cosplay booths, community partners, and a silent auction that got surprisingly loud.
cards.artNotes: Colorful hall with cosplay displays, community booths, activity tables, and bustling attendees.

localConnection.name: Edmund Fitzgerald Hall (DECC)
localConnection.description: Home of cosplay booths, community partners, TCGs, and activities at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Artist/Community hub. Artist LP buff at level 1, card draw at level 2. Winter LP scales with Artists. Advance condition is achievable with Artist People.

cards.name: Split Rock Stage
cards.advanceCondition: Control a People card with the Guest or Artist tag

abilities.text: Lvl 1: Guest-tagged People you control have +1 LP. Lvl 2: Also, when a Guest-tagged People enters play, gain 1 LP.
If you control a Guest-tagged People, you may look at the top 2 cards of your deck and keep 1.

cards.flavorText: The spotlight hits, the crowd roars, and for a moment everyone shares the magic.
cards.artNotes: Grand stage with dramatic lighting, a performer center stage, packed audience in silhouette.

localConnection.name: Split Rock (DECC)
localConnection.description: Largest event room at the DECC, hosts celebrity panels and the cosplay contest

cards.designerNotes: Guest-focused Location. Cheap to play (1 cost), easy advance condition. Guest LP buff and entry bonus at level 2. Summer card selection. Core Location for Guest decks.

cards.name: French River Panels
cards.advanceCondition: Play 2 or more Events in a single year

abilities.text: Lvl 1: Events you play cost 1 fewer total resource (minimum 0). Lvl 2: Also, when you play an Event, gain 1 LP.
Draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Two rooms, back-to-back panels, zero downtime — just how the con likes it.
cards.artNotes: Convention panel rooms with rows of chairs, projector screen, speakers at a table, full audience.

localConnection.name: French River 1 & 2 (DECC)
localConnection.description: Twin panel rooms at the DECC hosting panels all weekend at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Event cost reducer and payoff. Level 1 makes Events cheaper, Level 2 adds LP per Event. Autumn draw is reliable. Advance condition rewards Event-heavy play.

cards.name: RPG Hall
cards.advanceCondition: Control 2 or more People with the Gamer tag

abilities.text: Lvl 1: People with the Gamer tag have +1 LP. Lvl 2: Also, at the start of Summer, each player draws 1 card.
Gain 1 LP for each Gamer-tagged People you control.

cards.flavorText: Eleven tables, a hundred dice, and stories that only get better with retelling.
cards.artNotes: Long hall lined with RPG tables, each running a different game, dice and character sheets everywhere.

localConnection.name: RPG Hall
localConnection.description: Dedicated hall with 11 tables running tabletop RPG sessions at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Gamer hub. LP buff for Gamers, Summer draw at level 2, Winter LP scales. Pairs with Duluth D&D Player and Warhammer General. Advance condition is straightforward.

cards.name: Tournament Arena
cards.advanceCondition: Control a People with the Gamer tag and have played an Event this year

abilities.text: Lvl 1: When you play a card with the Gamer tag, gain 1 LP. Lvl 2: Also, Gamer-tagged Events give you +1 LP when played.
If at level 2, look at the top 3 cards. Keep 1.

cards.flavorText: Magic drafts, Star Wars showdowns, Lorcana leagues — there's always a tournament firing.
cards.artNotes: Competitive card game tournament area with players focused on matches, brackets on a board behind them.

localConnection.name: Tournament Area
localConnection.description: Card game tournament area hosting MTG, Star Wars Unlimited, Lorcana, and Nostalgix at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Gamer/Event crossover Location. LP on Gamer plays, bonus LP on Gamer Events at level 2. Autumn card selection at max level. Rewards a Gamer + Event mix.

cards.name: Sensory Sanctuary
cards.advanceCondition: Have 5 or fewer cards in hand at the start of Winter

abilities.text: Lvl 1: At the start of each Spring, you may discard 1 card to draw 2. Lvl 2: Also, gain 1 LP at the start of each Spring.
If you have the fewest cards in hand, gain 2 LP.

cards.flavorText: Sometimes the bravest thing at a con is knowing when to step away and breathe.
cards.artNotes: Quiet, softly-lit room with comfortable seating, dim lamps, calming colors, away from the bustle.

localConnection.name: Sensory Sanctuary (Gooseberry 1)
localConnection.description: Quiet room for attendees who need a sensory break, open both days at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Self-care themed. Advance condition rewards having fewer cards (a downside turned into upside). Spring card filtering, Winter LP for being behind on cards. Unique design space.

cards.name: Lake Superior Ballroom
cards.advanceCondition: Control 3 or more People cards

abilities.text: Lvl 1: Your People cards with the Social tag have +1 LP. Lvl 2: Also, at the start of Summer, gain 1 Community token from the pool.
Gain 1 LP for each Social-tagged card you control.

cards.flavorText: The bar, the music, the crowd — Saturday night at the con is where friendships are forged.
cards.artNotes: Elegant ballroom with a bar, people socializing in costume, warm lighting, Lake Superior visible.

localConnection.name: Lake Superior Ballroom (DECC)
localConnection.description: Social and bar area at the DECC, hub for evening events at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Social archetype Location. People-count advance condition. LP buff for Social People, Community resource generation. Winter LP scales with Social board.

cards.name: Community Gaming Lounge
cards.advanceCondition: Both players control at least 1 People card

abilities.text: Lvl 1: Both players draw 1 extra card in Spring. Lvl 2: Also, both players gain +1 LP in Winter.
You may trade 1 token with your opponent (give 1, take 1 of a different type).

cards.flavorText: Strangers walk in, sit down, roll dice — and leave as friends.
cards.artNotes: Open gaming area with groups playing board games, dice games, card games at communal tables.

localConnection.name: Community Gaming Area
localConnection.description: Open board game and social gaming area at Excalibur Con, sponsored by Dwarf King Taxi

cards.designerNotes: Generous shared-benefit Location. Both players draw and gain LP. The 0 LP base and shared benefits mean the owner needs to win via other means. Summer token trade adds interaction.

cards.name: Gooseberry Workshop
cards.advanceCondition: Control a People with the Artist tag

abilities.text: Lvl 1: When you play a People card with the Artist tag, gain 1 LP. Lvl 2: Also, Artist-tagged People you play enter Ready.
If you control 2+ Artist-tagged People, draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Painting minis, bead art, historical crafts — every table a different creative outlet.
cards.artNotes: Workshop room with multiple activity stations, people crafting and creating together.

localConnection.name: Gooseberry Rooms 2 & 3 (DECC)
localConnection.description: Workshop and activity rooms at the DECC hosting painting classes, demos, and creative events

cards.designerNotes: Artist deployment Location. LP on Artist entry, level 2 lets Artists enter Ready (can activate immediately). Autumn draw for Artist board. Easy advance condition.

cards.name: Celebrity Green Room
cards.advanceCondition: Control a People with the Guest tag

abilities.text: Lvl 1: Guest-tagged People cost 1 fewer total resource (min 0). Lvl 2: Also, when a Guest enters play, both players gain 1 LP.
If you control a Guest, you may Barter without returning a token (just take 2 different).

cards.flavorText: Behind every great panel is a quiet room with good snacks and a patient handler.
cards.artNotes: Comfortable backstage room with refreshments, a celebrity relaxing before their panel.

localConnection.name: Celebrity Green Room (DECC)
localConnection.description: Backstage room for celebrity guests to prepare between panels and signings

cards.designerNotes: Guest infrastructure. Cost reduction for Guests, LP on Guest entry (shared — community vibe). Spring resource economy boost with Guest on board. 0 LP base because value is in enabling Guests.

cards.name: DPW Wrestling Ring
cards.advanceCondition: Your opponent has more LP than you

abilities.text: Lvl 1: When you play a People card, your opponent discards 1 card (they choose). Lvl 2: Also gain 1 LP when opponent discards.
If you have fewer LP than your opponent, gain 2 LP.

cards.flavorText: From the top rope! The crowd goes wild in Edmund Fitzgerald Hall!
cards.artNotes: Wrestling ring set up in a convention hall, wrestlers performing for a cheering crowd.

localConnection.name: Discover Pro Wrestling (DPW)
localConnection.description: Live wrestling entertainment brought to Excalibur Con by promoter Dave Sabik

cards.designerNotes: Comeback mechanic Location. Advance condition requires being behind on LP — underdog theme matches wrestling. Discard on People entry disrupts opponent. Level 2 turns disruption into LP.

cards.name: North Star Open

abilities.text: Gain 3 LP. If you control a People with the Gamer tag, gain 4 LP instead. If you also control a Location with the Gamer tag, gain 5 LP.

cards.flavorText: Armies clash across miniature battlefields — and glory goes to the most strategic general.
cards.artNotes: Epic miniature wargaming tournament, armies deployed on elaborate terrain, focused players.

localConnection.name: North Star Open
localConnection.description: Warhammer miniatures tournament held at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Scaling LP Event. 3 base, 4 with Gamer People, 5 with Gamer Location. Rewards committing to Gamer board. 2-cost for up to 5 LP is strong but conditional.

cards.name: Lady of the Lake

abilities.text: Choose a Location you control. Advance it 1 level (ignore the advance condition). Gain 1 LP.

cards.flavorText: The sword rose from the lake — or in this case, from a very well-painted table.
cards.artNotes: Dramatic Kings of War miniature scene with a sword-in-lake tableau, players strategizing.

localConnection.name: Lady of the Lake (Kings of War)
localConnection.description: Kings of War miniatures event held early morning at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Location advancement Event. Bypasses advance conditions — very powerful for Location-heavy decks. 2 cost is fair for the effect. Named after the KoW event.

cards.name: Sealed Draft Frenzy

abilities.text: Both players draw 3 cards, then each discards 2. Gain 1 LP.

cards.flavorText: Crack the packs, build the deck, pray to the shuffle gods.
cards.artNotes: Excited players opening card packs, sorting cards rapidly, tournament clock ticking.

localConnection.name: Magic Sealed Draft
localConnection.description: Magic: The Gathering sealed draft events running all weekend at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Shared card churn. Both players draw 3 / discard 2 — net +1 for both, but you get LP. Cheap at 1 cost. Good for decks that want to dig for specific cards.

cards.name: Star Wars Unlimited Showdown

abilities.text: Gain 2 LP. If you control a People with the Gamer or Pop Culture tag, draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: In a galaxy far, far away... well, actually it's right here in the tournament area.
cards.artNotes: Players in an intense card game match, Star Wars imagery and cards spread on the table.

localConnection.name: Star Wars Unlimited Constructed
localConnection.description: Star Wars Unlimited card game tournament held Saturday at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Efficient LP Event with conditional draw. 2 LP at 1 cost is good rate. Draw with Gamer/Pop Culture People makes it better. Solid common.

cards.name: Lorcana League Night

abilities.text: Gain 2 LP. If you control a Location with the Gamer tag, gain 1 token of your choice from the pool.

cards.flavorText: Fairy tales and strategy — who knew Disney characters could be so competitive?
cards.artNotes: Players at a colorful card game tournament, whimsical card art visible on the table.

localConnection.name: Lorcana Constructed
localConnection.description: Disney Lorcana card game tournament held Sunday at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: LP + conditional resource. 2 LP base, any-type token with Gamer Location. Flexible resource gain is valuable. Good synergy with Tournament Arena.

cards.name: Cosplay Prejudging

abilities.text: Choose a People card you control with the Artist tag. It gains +2 LP until end of Winter. Draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Every seam inspected, every prop examined — this is where craftsmanship speaks.
cards.artNotes: Close-up of cosplay details being examined by judges, intricate costume work on display.

localConnection.name: Cosplay Prejudging
localConnection.description: Pre-contest judging for cosplay craftsmanship at Split Rock, Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Artist buff + cantrip. +2 LP to an Artist is significant. Draw replaces itself. 1 cost for a buff + draw is solid. Pairs with Cosplay Crafter and Cosplay Judge.

cards.name: Cosplay Contest Finals

abilities.text: Gain 2 LP for each People card you control with the Artist tag (maximum 8 LP). Each Artist-tagged People gains +1 LP until end of Winter.

cards.flavorText: The lights, the music, the crowd — and one unforgettable walk across the stage.
cards.artNotes: Spectacular cosplay contest on stage, spotlight on a winner, cheering crowd, confetti.

localConnection.name: Cosplay Contest
localConnection.description: Main cosplay competition held at 5 PM both days on the Split Rock stage at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Big Artist payoff Event. 2 LP per Artist (max 8) is the highest LP potential in the set — but needs 4 Artists for max value. Also buffs all Artists. Build-around Rare.

cards.name: Celebrity One Shot

abilities.text: If you control a Guest-tagged People, gain 5 LP and draw 2 cards. Otherwise, gain 2 LP and draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: The voice actor picked up the dice and said 'I cast fireball.' The crowd lost it.
cards.artNotes: Celebrity and fans playing an RPG together at a special table, excitement and laughter.

localConnection.name: Celebrity One Shot
localConnection.description: Special evening RPG session where celebrity guests play D&D with fans at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Guest payoff Event. With Guest: 5 LP + 2 cards is excellent for 2 cost. Without: 2 LP + 1 draw is baseline. Rewards having a Guest on board. Rare because of the high ceiling.

cards.name: Nerd Nite Live

abilities.text: Both players draw 2 cards. You gain 2 LP.

cards.flavorText: Five minutes on parasitic wasps. Five minutes on retro game design. Somehow both were riveting.
cards.artNotes: Lively presentation event, speaker with funny slides, audience laughing and engaged.

localConnection.name: Nerd Nite
localConnection.description: Community speaker series with short fun presentations on nerdy topics, both days at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Generous shared draw (2 each) + LP for you. Helps both players but you get the LP bonus. Good in any deck, especially Event-heavy builds.

cards.name: Fandom & Mental Health

abilities.text: Gain 2 LP. Choose a People card you control — it cannot be affected by your opponent's abilities until end of Winter.

cards.flavorText: It's okay to love something deeply. It's also okay to take a break from it.
cards.artNotes: Warm panel discussion about mental health and fandom, supportive audience, safe space.

localConnection.name: Fandom & Mental Health Panel
localConnection.description: Panel exploring the intersection of fandom passion and mental wellness at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: LP + protection. 2 LP plus shielding a People from opponent effects is both thematic and practical. Sustainability cost fits the self-care theme.

cards.name: Dylan's Drink & Draw

abilities.text: Both players draw 1 card. Each player with an Artist-tagged People gains 2 LP.

cards.flavorText: Pencils, pints, and the kind of conversation that only happens when everyone's creating.
cards.artNotes: Casual social art event, people sketching and chatting over drinks, friendly atmosphere.

localConnection.name: Dylan's Drink & Draw
localConnection.description: Social art event hosted by Dylan Jacobson at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Shared benefit Event. Both draw. Both can get LP if they have Artists. Truly community-oriented. The opponent benefits too, which fits Dylan's generous nature.

cards.name: Creative Anachronism

abilities.text: Gain 1 LP. Choose a People you control — it gains the Artist tag and +1 LP until end of Winter.

cards.flavorText: Medieval calligraphy meets modern fandom. The quill is mightier than you think.
cards.artNotes: Historical arts demonstration, calligraphy and medieval crafts, participants learning techniques.

localConnection.name: Creative Anachronism
localConnection.description: Historical arts and crafts activity held both days at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Tag-granting Event. Gives Artist tag + LP to a People. Combos with Artist synergy cards. 1 LP base plus the buff. Cheap and versatile.

cards.name: Princess Party

abilities.text: Gain 2 LP. If you control a People with the Youth tag, gain 3 LP instead and draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Every kid in the room was royalty for an afternoon.
cards.artNotes: Kids in princess and fantasy costumes at a party, face painting, decorations, pure joy.

localConnection.name: Princess Party
localConnection.description: Family-friendly princess party event on Sunday at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Youth synergy Event. 2 LP base, 3 LP + draw with Youth People. Good rate for 1 cost. Supports the Youth/Community archetype.

cards.name: KPop Demon Hunters Screening

abilities.text: Gain 3 LP. Each opponent also gains 1 LP. Draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: A haunted house, a K-pop soundtrack, and an audience that screamed in two languages.
cards.artNotes: Movie screening in a darkened room, audience reacting with excitement, colorful film on screen.

localConnection.name: KPop Demon Hunters Screening
localConnection.description: Special movie screening hosted by Marcus Theaters at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: High LP but gives opponent 1 LP. 3 net LP + draw at 1 cost is pushed — the opponent benefit balances it. Thematic: movies are shared experiences.

cards.name: Man with a Mania Premiere

abilities.text: Gain 3 LP. If you control Keith Hopkins, gain 5 LP instead. All People you control with the Duluth tag gain +1 LP until end of Winter.

cards.flavorText: A Minnesota story, a Minnesota premiere, a standing ovation from a Minnesota crowd.
cards.artNotes: Film premiere at a convention, filmmaker on stage, audience giving a standing ovation.

localConnection.name: Man with a Mania Premiere
localConnection.description: Minnesota premiere of Keith Hopkins' film at Excalibur Con 2026

cards.designerNotes: Named character combo. 3 LP base, 5 LP with Keith Hopkins. Duluth People buff adds value in Location/Duluth decks. 2 cost for high conditional LP.

cards.name: Improv Night

abilities.text: Gain 1 LP. Both players discard 1 card and draw 2 cards.

cards.flavorText: Yes, and... the entire front row was crying from laughter by the end.
cards.artNotes: Improv comedy show late at night, performers on stage, audience doubled over laughing.

localConnection.name: Improv Night
localConnection.description: Late-night improv comedy show on Saturday at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Card cycling Event. Both discard 1 / draw 2. Net +1 card each. You get LP. Helps dig through decks. Good in combo-oriented builds.

cards.name: LARP Battle

abilities.text: Gain 2 LP. Your opponent loses 1 LP (minimum 0). If you control a People with the Gamer tag, draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: Foam swords at dawn. Well, foam swords at 4:30 PM, but the drama was real.
cards.artNotes: Live action roleplay battle with foam weapons, participants in costume, cheering spectators.

localConnection.name: LARP Session
localConnection.description: Live action roleplay session at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Aggressive Event. 2 LP gain + 1 LP loss for opponent = 3 LP swing. Conditional draw. One of the few cards that directly reduces opponent LP.

cards.name: Silent Auction Bid

abilities.text: Return 1 token you control to the pool. Gain 3 LP and draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: She scribbled a higher bid and walked away whistling. The sword replica was hers.
cards.artNotes: Silent auction table with bid sheets, collectibles on display, someone writing a bid sneakily.

localConnection.name: Silent Auction
localConnection.description: Fundraising silent auction in Edmund Fitzgerald Hall at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Resource conversion. Spend 1 Growth + return any 1 token for 3 LP + draw. Net -2 tokens for 3 LP and a card. Good when you have excess tokens. Auction flavor.

cards.name: VIP Early Entry

abilities.text: Draw 3 cards, then discard 1. Gain 1 LP.

cards.flavorText: Thirty minutes before the doors open. The aisles are empty, the merch is untouched. Heaven.
cards.artNotes: Early morning entry, VIP badge holder walking into an empty convention hall, pristine vendor booths.

localConnection.name: VIP Early Entry
localConnection.description: VIP ticket holders enter 30 minutes early at 10:30 AM at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Premium draw Event. Draw 3 / discard 1 = net +2 cards, plus 1 LP. Strong for 1 cost. Growth cost is the premium (VIP costs money).

cards.name: Superhero U Workshop

abilities.text: Choose a People you control. It gains +2 LP until end of Winter. If you control Andrew Gray, it gains +3 LP instead.

cards.flavorText: Lesson one: heroes aren't born. They're trained. Now drop and give me twenty!
cards.artNotes: Workshop where a confident instructor teaches hero poses and confidence to participants.

localConnection.name: Superhero U
localConnection.description: Workshop run by Andrew Gray (Power Rangers) teaching confidence and heroism at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: People buff Event. +2 LP (or +3 with Andrew Gray). Clean and efficient. Named character combo adds deckbuilding interest. 1 cost for a big buff.

cards.name: Common House Bard

abilities.text: Gain 1 LP. All People you control gain +1 LP until end of Winter.

cards.flavorText: A lute, a voice, and an audience that forgot they were in a convention center.
cards.artNotes: Bard performing music in a fantasy-themed corner of the convention, enchanted listeners.

localConnection.name: Common House Bard
localConnection.description: Live musical performance held both days at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Board-wide buff Event. +1 LP to all People is strong with a wide board. 1 LP base too. Cheap at 1 cost. Best in People-heavy decks.

cards.name: Philosophy of D&D Panel

abilities.text: Draw 2 cards. If you control a People with the Gamer or Learning tag, gain 1 LP.

cards.flavorText: Is the alignment chart a moral framework? Discuss. You have five minutes.
cards.artNotes: Thoughtful panel discussion about roleplaying games and philosophy, engaged audience.

localConnection.name: Philosophy of D&D
localConnection.description: Panel exploring philosophical themes in tabletop RPGs, Sunday at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Draw 2 with conditional LP. Solid card advantage at 1 cost. Gamer/Learning tag condition is easy to meet. Dependable common.

cards.name: Neurodiversity 101

abilities.text: Gain 2 LP. If you control a Location with the Self-Care or Community tag, gain 3 LP instead.

cards.flavorText: Understanding starts with listening. The room was very, very good at listening.
cards.artNotes: Inclusive panel discussion about neurodiversity, attentive diverse audience, warm lighting.

localConnection.name: Neurodiversity 101 Panel
localConnection.description: Panel on neurodiversity awareness and inclusion, Sunday at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Self-Care archetype support. 2 LP base, 3 LP with Self-Care/Community Location. Sustainability cost is thematic. Good with Sensory Sanctuary.

cards.name: Local Game Dev Showcase

abilities.text: Gain 1 LP. Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Keep 1, put the rest back in any order.

cards.flavorText: Two people, one laptop, and a game that had everyone downloading the demo on the spot.
cards.artNotes: Indie game developers showing their game at a booth, players gathered around screens.

localConnection.name: Local Game Developers Panel
localConnection.description: Panel showcasing local game developers at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Deep card selection. Look at 4, keep 1 is very good for finding specific cards. 1 LP + card selection at 1 cost is efficient.

cards.name: Oaken Hollow Demo

abilities.text: Gain 2 LP. You may return 1 Sustainability token to the pool to draw 2 cards.

cards.flavorText: Tiny wooden gears, hand-carved joints — sometimes the old ways are the best ways.
cards.artNotes: Woodworking and crafting demonstration, intricate wooden creations on display, fascinated onlookers.

localConnection.name: Oaken Hollow Demos
localConnection.description: Crafting demonstrations and workshops by Oaken Hollow at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: LP + optional draw. 2 LP guaranteed. Can spend an extra Sustainability for 2 cards. Flexible — take the LP or invest for cards. Sustainability theme.

cards.name: Sponsor Spotlight

abilities.text: Gain 2 tokens of your choice from the pool (may be different types). Gain 1 LP.

cards.flavorText: Level Up, Collectors Connection, Radisson — every sponsor made this con possible.
cards.artNotes: Sponsor banners and logos displayed prominently, appreciation ceremony moment.

localConnection.name: Convention Sponsors
localConnection.description: Major sponsors including Level Up, Collectors Connection, Radisson, and many more supporting Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Resource generation Event. 2 flexible tokens + 1 LP for 1 Growth. Net +1 token + 1 LP. The flexibility of choosing any types is very valuable for multi-resource decks.

cards.name: Con Badge Trade

abilities.text: You and your opponent each draw 1 card. You gain 2 LP. Your opponent gains 1 LP.

cards.flavorText: Ribbons, pins, and the sacred art of the lanyard swap.
cards.artNotes: Two attendees excitedly trading badge ribbons and pins, lanyards covered in collectibles.

localConnection.name: Badge Ribbons and Trading
localConnection.description: Attendee tradition of collecting and trading badge ribbons at Excalibur Con

cards.designerNotes: Social interaction Event. Both draw, both gain LP (you more). Shared benefit fits the trading theme. Community cost is appropriate. Solid role-player.

cards.name: Closing Ceremony

abilities.text: Gain 1 LP for each unique tag among cards you control (maximum 6 LP). Draw 1 card.

cards.flavorText: See you next year, Duluth. Same place, same magic, whole new memories.
cards.artNotes: Emotional closing moment on stage, committee waving to cheering crowd, convention banners.

localConnection.name: Excalibur Con Committee Panel
localConnection.description: Closing panel and ceremony wrapping up the convention

cards.designerNotes: Diversity payoff. LP scales with unique tags you control — rewards a varied board. Max 6 LP at 2 cost is excellent if you hit it. Build diverse boards.
